name: kimi-agent-task-context
doc: Kimi dispatches sub-agents via the `Agent` tool, not `Task` (isAgentTool, handle-pre.ts): with a .kimi-code/apex target present, a PreToolUse Agent call triggers the APEX sub-agent context injection — before the fix the branch tested `Task` only and never fired for kimi. Note: the envelope itself is still the legacy Claude-shaped contextResponse (kimi consumption of additionalContext is unverified upstream); this scenario locks the TRIGGER, not the envelope.

steps.doc: Agent tool with an apex target present -> isAgentTool matches -> taskContext emits the APEX sub-agent injection.
